---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement consistent with project principles
title: "feature: "
labels: enhancement
---

# Feature Request

## Problem

What rider or development problem does this solve?

## Proposed outcome

Describe the smallest useful change, not a complete product roadmap.

## Scope classification

- Confirmed requirement affected:
- Current assumption challenged:
- Open question to resolve:
- Deferred idea or V1 exclusion affected:

## Alternatives considered

## Acceptance criteria

## Safety and compatibility considerations

Explain any impact on distraction, glove use, power, BLE HID compatibility,
vehicle integration, or testing. A proposal must not introduce safety-critical
motorcycle control into V1.
